meaning: n.(古代爱尔兰的)诗人(地位高于吟游诗人而与法学家、历史学家等属于同一阶层)
examples: Meanwhile, longtime NBC News president Steve Capus stepped down after having seen most of his power assumed by Patricia Fili-Kruschel.
The book features prime examples from Ms. Fili's personal collection of vintage logos and signage, culled mostly from flea markets throughout Europe.
Chief among them: "Scripts: Elegant Lettering From Design's Golden Age, " a tome co-authored by the graphic designer Louise Fili (her former boss) and Steven Heller.
